settings.title: Authenticity First
settings.description: Every item is verified genuine. No reproductions, no fakes, no exceptions.

settings.title: Fair Pricing
settings.description: We price based on real market data. You'll never overpay for condition or rarity.

settings.title: Collector Care
settings.description: Museum-grade packaging, insured shipping, and a 14-day return policy on every order.

settings.title: Community
settings.description: Join thousands of collectors on our Discord. Trade tips, share pulls, and connect.

settings.quote: I found a 1st Edition Charizard in excellent condition. Fair price and truly professional service.

settings.quote: Great selection of CIB N64 games. Rare to find games this well preserved with boxes and manuals.

settings.quote: The go-to shop for collectors in Quebec. TCG and retro under one roof, authentic pieces, fast shipping.
